allow: Bash(NODE_ENV=test mongosh wildduck-test --eval "db.users.findOne({_id: ObjectId(''68cf018b0a8ce38871a258e5'')}, {_id: 1, username: 1, name: 1, address: 1})")
Bash(NODE_ENV=test npx mocha test/api-test.js --timeout 30000 --reporter spec --grep "should GET /users/:user expect success")
Bash(NODE_ENV=test npx mocha test/api-test.js --timeout 60000 --reporter spec --grep "should PUT /users/:user/autoreply expect success")
Bash(NODE_ENV=test npx mocha test/api-test.js --timeout 30000 --reporter spec --grep "should POST /users/:user/mailboxes/:mailbox/messages expect success / with text and html")
